commands.review_summary:
The PR adds gateway dashboard and incident APIs, a tool activity registry, dashboard delta scheduling, overview polling, and Mission Control panels for tool runtime, execution queue, and autonomy posture.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR review findings via source inspection: the PR registers dashboard callbacks before requestContext assignment, records all global agent events before the current visibility guard, and classifies tool result events without data.isError. I did not run a live browser reproduction in this read-only review.
